summary: Garden Stats Playwright test suite covers 7 scenarios including rendering, computed values, semantic markup, skeleton replacement, responsive layout, positioning, and empty-manifest hidden state.

scenarios.name: Renders on homepage with three populated stat items
Computes day count, shipped count, and start date from manifest
Uses semantic markup and accessible labeling
Fully replaces skeleton node after hydration
Switches from stacked mobile to row layout on desktop
Sits between How It Works section and main content
Hides section when manifest has no entries

notes: Tests use routed-site helper (getAppUrl + installLocalSiteRoutes) for portability across both webserver and PLAYWRIGHT_DISABLE_WEBSERVER=1 validation modes. Empty-manifest test uses LIFO route ordering to override the manifest after local-site routes are installed.
